Name: Library 3rd Floor Q group table
Description: Nice and tucked away, good to work with a small group of friends. Sometimes this spot gets snapped up fast.

Name: Main Green
Description: Good to do readings or light work outside with friends.

Name: Milwaukee-Downer room
Description: Pretty wood bookshelves and details, cozy couches

Name: Steitz Atrium
Description: Lots of light, can be nice and warm in the winter because of the windows

Name: Il Bar Coffee
Description: The bar seating by the window is nice

Name: Library 1st Floor tables
Description: Good for group projects.

Name: Warch 4th floor
Description: Nice individual desks, group tables, and armchairs

Name: Copper Rock (College Avenue)
Description: If you can get one, the booths are great for studying with friends. It can get pretty loud in here if it's busy so not the best if you don't have good headphones.

Name: Hiett common areas
Description: Big south-facing windows, nice in the winter to get some sunlight.

Name: Library 4th Floor Kruse Room
Description: Good sunlight

Name: Lincoln Reading Room
Description: Big pretty windows, gorgeous in the fall. No food allowed in here, don't bring snacks

Name: Library 4th Floor Carrels
Description: Silent study by yourself, good for if you want to block out distractions.

Name: Cafe
Description: Can get loud and busy around mealtimes, but the seats by the window are nice to work with outlets nearby– also great people-watching

Name: Briggs lobby
Description: Nice view of the river. Good to sit and study during office hours in case you get stuck.

Name: West Campus 2nd Floor
Description: Big window that looks right out over the LU Arch

Name: Colman lobby
Description: Good variety of seating: booths, couches, and chairs/tables. Sometimes big groups in the booths can get loud.

Name: Brewed Awakenings
Description: Good food, can get v busy on weekends.

Name: Warch patio
Description: Seasonal, they take these away in the winter. Tables v wobbly but nice when it's nice out

Name: Library 2nd floor/CAS
Description: Math tutoring here, nice group tables

Name: Uncle Mike's Food Emporium
Description: Good place to get food, outdoor patio on the restaurant part is v nice

Name: Youngchild 121
Description: Lots of little group tables, fantastic place to lock in if empty. Physics, bio, and chem tutoring held here.

Name: Librart 2nd Floor QRC
Description: Math and computer science tutoring here

Name: Youngchild Environmental Commons
Description: Basically an empty classroom. Good for quiet homework with a couple friends

Name: West Campus Computer Science/Math commons
Description: Cool booths and stuff here and nice and quiet

Name: Warch Somerset room
Description: Awesome windows with a nice view of the river

Name: Tempest Coffee
Description: Very nice view of the river.

Name: Memorial Hall Diversity Equity & Inclusion Center
Description: Awesome couches and very cozy in the winter

Name: Library viewing/listening rooms
Description: Little rooms that require ID access, good for if you need total quiet

Name: Library Level A
Description: Limited spots, but there's a couple of nice group tables. Level A has the periodicals collection, so it's generally nice and quiet.

Name: Bubolz Nature Preserve
Description: Beautiful hiking/walking trails, and indoor study spaces in "The Lodge"

Name: Appleton Public Library
Description: Recently renovated, really nice new spaces, and some good private meeting rooms.

Name: Main hall reading room
Description: Nice couches and wingback armchairs.

Name: Spirit House
Description: Nice to study in a "house house"

Name: Conservatory couches
Description: Comfy and social, good place to study between classes/lessons in the con

Name: 2nd Floor Wellness
Description: Nice round table and some couches, typically pretty quiet. Smells like pool.

Name: Copper Rock (North Side)
Description: Usually quieter than the copper rock on College, booths are less comfy.

Name: Trout Museum Coffee Shop
Description: New!

Name: Starbucks (College Ave)
Description: It's a Starbucks

Name: Acoca Coffee
Description: A little farther off campus

Name: Seth's Coffee (mall)
Description: Hidden Seth's coffee!
